title: Problem with duplication
excerpt: I understand how to duplicate a board. Unfortunately, its greyed out for some reason now. Any ideas on how this can be fixed?

posts.author: Mrjoelbaker (Joel baker)
posts.cookedHtml: I understand how to duplicate a board. Unfortunately, its greyed out for some reason now. Any ideas on how this can be fixed?

posts.author: Mrjoelbaker (Joel baker)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone have any idea why the duplicate board would be greyed out?

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mrjoelbaker!

That sounds like a permissions isssue to me…I would check with the account admin to make sure that you have duplicating permissions.

If you’re the admin, I’d make sure that you have added yourself as a workspace owner and a board owner. That should usually give you the option to duplicate boards

Tanner
tanner@elevateops.io
Monday.com Consultant

posts.author: gvanderwerken (Gerrit Jan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Tanner!
I had the same issue and after reading your response figured that it was caused by the fact that I had to be a workspace owner (beside being a board owner).
